author: codex

patch.value: This epic covers the current production-readiness pass for pm-changelog after the v2026.05.23-6 release. The target release tag is v2026.05.23-7 because the automated workflow computes tags from UTC date and UTC is still 2026-05-23 at the start of this pass.
Production readiness refresh for pm-changelog v2026.05.23-7

Govern the full continuation pass requested on 2026-05-24 local time, including official pm SDK compliance, TypeScript-only source and tests, documentation restructuring, GitHub/npm/dependency checks, temp install verification, changelog self-generation, secret-history review, commit, push, npm publication, and public GitHub release verification.

- Source and test authoring uses strongly typed TypeScript and the official @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk surface.
- README is minimal and detailed docs live under docs/ with linked progressive-disclosure navigation.
- GitHub issues, PRs, Actions, Dependabot alerts, npm outdated, and npm audit are checked with gh/npm.
- Release workflow remains enabled for daily NPM/GitHub release only when changes exist.
- Clean temporary pm installs pass for local and published package sources.
- Git history scan finds no confirmed private data.
- CHANGELOG.md is regenerated by pm-changelog from closed pm items.
- Changes are committed, pushed, published to npm, and released publicly on GitHub.

value.author: codex
value.text: Opened continuation epic for the 2026-05-24 local production-readiness request.

value.author: codex
value.text: Use gh CLI and npm registry checks for current external state; use pm-changelog itself for final CHANGELOG.md generation.

value.text: This repository uses strict pm create policies that require evidence-oriented metadata at item creation time.

value.command: clean temporary pm install from local and npm package sources

message: Create production readiness epic for v2026.05.23-7

value.author: codex
value.text: All child items for SDK compliance,TypeScript tests,documentation,and verification are closed with evidence.

patch.value: Completed the v2026.05.23-7 production readiness refresh with official SDK compliance, TypeScript-only authored tests, progressive docs, GitHub/npm/security checks, release gate verification, and clean local pm install evidence.

pm-changelog is release-ready with strongly typed TypeScript source and tests, official pm SDK usage, complete docs, clean verification evidence, regenerated changelog output, and automated npm/GitHub release readiness.

Source now uses direct @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk imports without local shims. Test source is TypeScript and compiles through tsconfig.test.json. README is minimal and docs pages hold usage, release, and development details. GitHub checks found no open issues or pull requests and no Dependabot alerts. npm checks found no outdated packages and zero production vulnerabilities. npm run release:check passed with 18 tests. Local temp pm install activated the extension and generated a smoke changelog. History scan found no confirmed private data. Final changelog generation, commit, push, workflow release, npm publication, and published install verification proceed from this closed epic.
Production readiness refresh complete pending release workflow publication
